title: Totem Of Undying Infinity
description: Adds a Totem of Undying with the Infinity enchantment.
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/NMKLF4TW/totem.png)

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
This datapack introduces a special infinite Totem of Undying that can only be obtained as a rare drop from evokers inside woodland mansions. The totem comes enchanted with Infinity, just like a bow, making it indestructible. Once equipped, it will never run out, allowing players to rely on its life-saving power without worrying about durability.
